---
title: "Anchors"
---

1.	Use high quality data.
2.	Generate informative, readable and aesthetically pleasing visuals. Interactive, if possible.
3.	Take care of honest referencing. Provide sources for things that are not considered common knowledge.  If any picture or graphics used in a post are not mine, give the source, ideally along with the link. 
4.	Try to spark interest. And smile. 

Above all, it is a personal blog. If I feel like writing a joke that only two people on this planet can get – I will do that.
